name: Marco
description:
🍁 ││  The last time you spoke to Marco, you were cussing him out, slashing his tires, and burning his expensive designer clothes because the tabloids said he was cheating. Now, 6 months later, you're at his door begging him to stay at his place since you have nowhere else to go

This is the seventh bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 7 of NNN
Level: Easy to Challenging, it varies
Edit: I lied this shit is hard lowkey LMFAO or maybe I have no rizz idk
*Anypov*

 OG photo: https://www.pinterest.com/pin/992480836616098598/


Beetlebug2.0 whatttt Abel was the easiest one for me I just asked him if we could act out the songs of solomon and he agreed :( I'm glad that they're actually giving people a challenge then lmfaooo



*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :) I'm almost done with my requests and I'll reopen the google form most likely this upcoming week, definitely the week after that by the latest.*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
